title: Diagnose Python venv and port-5555 process survival
description: Two problems observed: (1) exec_mtask_0109 always falls back to system python (no fastapi installed), so new uvicorn cannot start — need to find the correct venv path. (2) Old uvicorn process survives kill and re-claims port 5555. Diagnose: (a) run 'find /home/larieladmin -name activate -path */bin/activate 2>/dev/null | head -10' to locate all venvs; (b) which python3 has fastapi installed (pip show fastapi for each venv); (c) lsof -ti :5555 before and after kill to see if process restarts; (d) check if PM2/supervisor/systemd is managing the backend: pm2 list 2>/dev/null; supervisorctl status 2>/dev/null; systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running 2>/dev/null | grep -i uvicorn. Report all findings.
